title: An LLM Wiki
summary: A public, privacy-filtered Obsidian LLM Wiki rebuilt around Karpathy's llm-wiki pattern.
contentLines: This is a public-safe personal Obsidian knowledge base rebuilt around Andrej Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern.

Raw material stays local. Public pages are compiled, linked, and source-aware Markdown notes. Sensitive local paths, credentials, private memory, raw conversations, and unreviewed imports are excluded from the public repository.
goal: A public, privacy-filtered Obsidian LLM Wiki rebuilt around Karpathy's llm-wiki pattern.
audience: 希望沿着公开资料路线学习、复刻或维护知识库的读者。
finalOutput: 形成一条可复用的公开学习或构建路径。

title: MuleRun 技能知识网络索引 (MuleRun Skills MOC)
slug: wiki-concepts-04-知识库-领域研究-ai-agent技术-技能库-mulerun_skills_hub_moc
summary: 🛠️ MuleRun 技能知识网络索引 (MuleRun Skills MOC)
sourcePath: wiki/concepts/04-知识库-领域研究-AI-Agent技术-技能库-MuleRun_Skills_Hub_MOC.md
href: /content/wiki-concepts-04-知识库-领域研究-ai-agent技术-技能库-mulerun_skills_hub_moc
contentLines: # MuleRun 技能知识网络索引 (MuleRun Skills MOC)
> Migrated from the pre-rebuild vault after privacy filtering. Local paths and direct identifiers were redacted.
# 🛠️ MuleRun 技能知识网络索引 (MuleRun Skills MOC)
> **目标**: 本索引旨在对 **153** 个 MuleRun 专业 Agent 技能进行多维度分类与导航，为 `accio` 的技能扩展提供资源地图。
- **核心框架**: django-tdd, django-patterns, python-patterns, golang-patterns, rust-patterns, kotlin-patterns, cpp-coding-standards
- **测试与质量**: test-driven-development, ai-regression-testing, systematic-debugging, python-testing, golang-testing, rust-testing, perl-testing
### 🤖 Agent 逻辑与元能力 (Agent Meta-Skills)
- **技能开发**: skill-creator, skill-creator-2, mcp-builder, writing-skills
- **编排协作**: subagent-driven-development, dispatching-parallel-agents, executing-plans, writing-plans
- **多渠道营销**: linkedin-audience, instagram-audience, reddit-marketing, quora-marketing, community-marketing
- **邮件与转化**: onboarding-emails, win-back-emails, monthly-newsletters, reactivation-emails
- **文档处理**: docx, doc-coauthoring, spreadsheet, slides, jupyter-notebook
| 评级 | 数量 | 核心推荐 |
1. **按需激活**: 建议根据当前项目类型（如 `mcc` 是 Node/TS）优先激活对应的后端模式。
2. **原子化拆分**: 目前技能库以大文件形式存在，建议由 Technical-Writer 逐步拆分为独立的 `.md` 文件。
3. **元能力优先**: 优先内化 `skill-creator` 和 `mcp-builder`，实现技能的自主进化。
goal: 🛠️ MuleRun 技能知识网络索引 (MuleRun Skills MOC)
audience: 希望沿着公开资料路线学习、复刻或维护知识库的读者。
finalOutput: 形成一条可复用的公开学习或构建路径。

title: Karpathy LLM Wiki Pattern
summary: Official pattern source for this vault architecture.
contentLines: The official architecture source for this vault is Andrej Karpathy's `llm-wiki.md` gist:
- raw material remains separate from compiled wiki pages
- the LLM maintains a persistent Markdown artifact
- Obsidian is the browsing and graph surface
- schema/rule files guide future agent maintenance

title: Karpathy LLM Wiki Pattern
contentLines: > Migrated from the pre-rebuild vault after privacy filtering. Local paths and direct identifiers were redacted.
- Source type: GitHub Gist / idea file
Karpathy's document is a pattern, not a fixed repository template. The durable core for this vault is:
- raw material is separate from compiled wiki pages
- the LLM maintains a persistent markdown artifact instead of re-deriving from raw sources on every query
- Obsidian is the browsing and graph surface
- rules/schema files tell future agents how to maintain consistency
- Git is useful for version history once privacy exclusions are in place
This repository is not Karpathy's official source. It is useful as a current implementation reference because it packages the same pattern as agent-readable skills, scripts, and setup docs.
- Keep the existing Chinese/English hybrid vault structure.
- Use `wiki/` as the curated LLM Wiki workbench.
- Keep existing canonical folders such as `04 - 知识库/` and cross-link them instead of moving them in bulk.
- Treat `09 - 本地导入/` as an uncurated source-heavy area until pages are promoted intentionally.
audience: 希望沿着公开资料路线学习、复刻或维护知识库的读者。

title: 提示词仓库 MOC
slug: wiki-topics-04-知识库-提示词库-提示词仓库-moc
summary: 建立'最佳 agent **提示词内容仓库**'，支持多 Agent 可复用、可版本化、可审计。
sourcePath: wiki/topics/04-知识库-提示词库-提示词仓库-MOC.md
href: /content/wiki-topics-04-知识库-提示词库-提示词仓库-moc
contentLines: > Migrated from the pre-rebuild vault after privacy filtering. Local paths and direct identifiers were redacted.
> 建立"最佳 agent **提示词内容仓库**"，支持多 Agent 可复用、可版本化、可审计。
> 提示词**不是散落文本**，而是"可调用资产"（带元数据、适用范围、失败模式、示例输入输出）。
- [[提示词-总控-系统主控执行引擎]] — Controller 角色：拆解/派发/验证/交付
- 提示词-写入-黑曜石AOS写入协议 — No Link No File、KB/AM 隔离、DoD
| 分类 | 路径 | 说明 |
| 总控 (Controller) | `controller/*` | 系统主控执行引擎 |
| 研发 (Engineering) | `eng/*` | 代码生成/重构/测试/运维 |
| 研究 (Research) | `research/*` | 调研、对比、选型、证据链 |
| QA/审计 (Audit) | `qa/*` | 破坏性审计、DoD 评估、回归 |
> [!danger] 约定（给 agent 的硬规则）
> · [[提示词-总控-系统主控执行引擎]] · 提示词-写入-黑曜石AOS写入协议 · OpenClaw 主控核心执行协议 · Codex 主控行为规范与执行逻辑优化

title: Agent 生ated MOC
summary: 🌐 Agent 生态地图 (Map of Content)
contentLines: > Migrated from the pre-rebuild vault after privacy filtering. Local paths and direct identifiers were redacted.
# 🌐 Agent 生态地图 (Map of Content)
> 本 MOC 索引了 GitHub 上最前沿的 60+ AI Agent 项目，按功能类别、技术栈及社区共识进行分类导航。
- LangGraph - 生产环境首选，状态机驱动。
- [[CrewAI]] - 入门首选，角色扮演模式。
- [[AutoGen]] - 微软出品，多 Agent 协作研究。
- [[MetaGPT]] - 专注于软件工程流程的 Agent。
- Claude Code - 终端原生，逻辑深度高。
## 🌐 浏览器与 Web 自动化 (Web Agents)
- [[Browser-use]] - 视觉驱动的浏览器控制。
- [[MCP (Model Context Protocol)]] - 新兴行业标准。
- 领域专用 Agent 汇总
goal: 🌐 Agent 生态地图 (Map of Content)
audience: 希望沿着公开资料路线学习、复刻或维护知识库的读者。
